reviews.review_description: The game wouldn't work in multilayer, I have  barely hopped on for 10 minutes and have only owned gane for 11 days.

A good looking game that realy gives the vibe of being in the show.

And thats about all the positive news i got.
Is it boring? Yes

That about it, i cant say it any better.
Its is a quality game everything works or behaves like it should, but its just so slow, tedious and boring.
Dont buy this game for its solo game, its overpriced.
Now for coop i cant say but it should be more fun.

I bought this game for my dad and myself (I bought 2 copies) so we could play together. Multiplayer doesn't work, there are no servers. I haven't even tried playing it alone because I really only play to spend time with my dad. Is there a fix? This looked like it would be a fun game, but basically just paid for disappointment... Now I know how Dad feels 😭

I am a huge fan of the show. Absolutely loved it! The game is very stable, graphics are decent (the characters are just like in the show) and the co-op is probably the easiest to start than most VR games. Solid shooter! Great job to the developers and writers! I’ll be the first in line to buy the sequel!!!

💰 25% off coupon link (https://www.oculus.com /appreferrals/xinwix/5352920984748732/?utm_source=2)

As a huge fan of the animated series Final Space, I was excited to get my hands on the VR game "Final Space VR - The Rescue". And I have to say, I was not disappointed. Here are my thoughts on the game, broken down into pros and cons:

🔥 Pros:

🚀 Exciting and immersive gameplay that captures the essence of the show
🤖 Stunning graphics, sound effects and vocals that transport players into the world of Final Space
🕹️ Thrilling co-op gameplay with up to 3 friends for a more dynamic experience
🎤 Original voice cast from the show to enhance the immersion
🕹️ Intuitive and easy-to-play controls for players of all skill levels
🎨 Vibrant cartoon-style visuals that bring the game to life
🎮 Enjoyable and fun gameplay experience with friends
🤣 Hilarious moments that will have you laughing out loud
🎮 Different gameplay strategies and weapon choices to keep the experience fresh
🕹️ Engaging story and well-written voice lines
🎨 Visually pleasing and attention-grabbing
🗣️ Great character dialogues that keep the players invested in the story
🕹️ Co-op story driven gameplay that encourages players to play with friends
💰 Affordable price at $14.99 with 25% off coupon link (https://www.oculus.com /appreferrals/xinwix/5352920984748732/?utm_source=2)

🥶 Cons:

🤯 Can be mind-numbing for those who aren't fans of the show
🤯 May not be as engaging for those unfamiliar with the show
🔁 Repetitive gameplay in single player mode
🕰️ Limited playtime
🏃‍♂️ Slow movement speed
📚 Tutorial integrated into chapter one, which can make replaying the game less appealing.

As a fan of the show, I was thrilled to be able to immerse myself in the world of Final Space and interact with familiar characters. The graphics, sound, and vocals are all top-notch and really bring the universe to life. The co-op gameplay was a lot of fun and added a new layer of excitement to the game.

On the downside, the gameplay can feel repetitive when played alone, and the game is on the short side. Also, the running speed is slow, which can make the single player experience feel a bit tedious.

Overall, I would highly recommend "Final Space VR - The Rescue" to fans of the show. The game is a lot of fun and offers a great way to experience the world of Final Space in a new way. With the 25% off coupon link, it's worth the price. However, for those who are not fans of the show, the game might not be as enjoyable and the short game length and slow running speed may be a turn off.

The game won’t let me move. I tried every setting and ￼every￼ way to try, but every time I enter the game, it doesn’t allow me to move my character. I have no idea if it’s an issue only for me but this game used to work, now it doesn’t.￼￼

Pros: you get the original voice cast doing their characters! I loved Final Space and was excited this was coming!  

Cons: boring wave shooter with endless amounts of the same enemy type (literally called S.A.M.E.S.). It's coop so at least you can be bored with your friends, but the game is basically a dollar store piece of junk. It lacks the charm of the show. Just.  Walk into a room and endlessly fight hordes like you were playing Destiny or something.

Whole thing's a bit of a mess, really. I played for 20 mins and just bailed.

Mooncake always says "chookity-pop" but this was more of a chocolatey plop.

Final Space feels like it was meant to be in VR. The game itself is amazing!! And that's not even mentioning that it BRINGS BACK FINAL SPACE, after it was prematurely canceled. If the only way we can get more is to play it from the inside, that's A-Okay with me!! Highly recommend for a million reasons.
Final space is my favorite show this game is even better haven’t gotten far
it was okay,  fun multi-player

I love the atmosphere of the game to the smallest detail of the world design being a massive prison ship over taken by a Rouge AI S.T.E.V.E.N to the cameras set up right where S.T.E.V.E.N can over see your teams every move the character designs are fun and intergenic and really feed in the fact that I'm in final space the guns blow me away everytime I see them in game I wish I could customize them or carry all of them, but I wish I could upgrade them the pistols and sub-machine guns which are by far the most appealing design for me (BESIDES THE GRENADE LAUCHER!) and I felt bad for ditching them for something stronger like the shotgun and rifle BTW the cool down for that gun is awesome I just wish I could hold on to pistols immaculate design through the whole game knowing hey I can still kick butt with these, but if solo run it you'll always gravitate towards a strong build through out the short story no matter how much you love this game. I have so much more tall about but if you're a fun for this show by this game it's amazing, but for those looking for me here every main stage for this game has its own flavor to prison yards to death areas its impressive so impressive I only want more my only complaints I had for this game is the slow walk let me atleast choice to get motion sickness and the enemy variety only because every enemy looked amazing I only wanted to see more of the design I have seen in the show I was hoping bounty hunters would show up and try taking over the ship or atleast some other space entity bring drag off in the hall ways by S.T.E.V.E.Ns alien children it would of set up the over arcing story so much better and where is all my puns man Gary and the crew need more spot light please add more mission or atleast a wave shooter mode or even better a map maker If you let us make are own maps with the assist and share them with each other I'll be internally grateful I love to see more whacky situations for the final space team, but any ways I love your first game on quest and I hope to see more because I'll be there 🎸🎵❤

reviews.review_title: I need someone to PLAY this game with
reviews.review_description:
Hi! I just Got this game and my friends do not have it.

Will you like to PLAY this game with me ?
Totally fun game, an experience worth trying for a freedom cookie

Fun ,creative,  action packed from start to finish and short. 
The storyline is funny but it's short. My only true complaint is the character cannot / does not have a control option to run . Character speed is walking. Overall I would definitely buy this game. It's better then most games on oculus2. The graphics are cartoon type but very cool. Live to see the next dlc .
For sure this game was one of the best space simulations I’ve ever seen this serpases all the other quest games I’ve experienced
I still dont know how is It posible It only has 4.1 Stars its an amazing shooter amazing story and voice acting by Olan Rogers. Its one of the best games and pretty cheap so buy it its perfect

I have played though this game a few times with my friend we both love final space but we found it short and left us yearning for more. And when I play(or try to) play online multi player it didn't work. It felt like me and my friend were the only ones that had it. BUT the story was amazing,the voice lines were well thought out for different characters relations and the way It didn't connect to Canon left a hole for upcoming seasons. The graphics are amazing icould sell it as art! My overall review is if you're going to buy it know that it is short and also makes funny bonding moments with friends
As a fan of the show I really love that game but it can be a little bit repetitive,but hey like everyone I miss the show so I have a great time!

I love Final Space tv show, is hilarious and sometimes quite deep, I was expecting more action, probably some animations with the characters of the show, lots of weapons and even spaceships or Gary’s jet pack, but the game is very boring, same enemies in the 3 phases and 4 weapons. It seems like it has been done with a wizard for 3D games or similar, needs more love for sure!

This game is fairly new I love it there are some things that I think an update can fix like a button To run Besides that I find a picture the story and the gameplay extremely fun add more stuff to play with even better Thanks guys
